creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
Thanks for the patch.

Please note that as the maintainer of the port you can set maintainer-approval(+) flag on your attachment to help us track the issue through "Maintainer Approved" saved search.

Also please note that confirming QA is sufficient by mentioning it, eg. "Build passes with Poudriere 10.3 amd64", no need to attach build logs that only clutter the Bugzilla database.

However, why is the patch adding the TIMESTAMP line for three additional ports?
